description: align_engines: 2 auth profiles across 2 handlers (jamf-protect-event-collector + jamf-v2). Each engine trio (unprefixed, passthrough_jamf_v2_*, plain_jamf_v2_*) is merged into one fields block; every engine_group token is renamed to engineGroup (connection field id + engine_mode dropdown key; triggers value + effect id + child id; serializer field_mappings id, including prefixed variants); engine + engineGroup get create/edit required: true.
